vulnerability.title: Verify Permissions on Backup gshadow File
vulnerability.description: To properly set the permissions of /etc/gshadow-, run the command: $ sudo chmod 0000 /etc/gshadow-

triage_decision.reason: File permission change on a backup file (/etc/gshadow-) with no direct impact on SSH/console access or critical services. Follows STIG hardening patterns for file permissions and is explicitly listed as safe_to_remediate in policy.
triage_decision.estimated_impact: authentication/authorization affected; Low risk as it's a backup file; primary authentication files are unaffected.
